About the Event

Run With Purpose.
Run With Brotherhood.

The Apolinario Mabini Masonic Lodge No. 235 proudly presents Fun Run 2026 — a community celebration of health, unity, and Masonic brotherhood in Cuyapo, Nueva Ecija.

Whether you are a seasoned runner or joining your first race, this event welcomes everyone. Lace up, join the 5K, and be part of something meaningful.

All Ages ₱300 Entry Cash Prizes Medals Race Shirt

Race Category

The 5K Run

One category. One challenge. Everyone is welcome — from first-timers to seasoned runners.

Official Category — 2026
5
KILOMETERS
5K Fun Run
A 5-kilometer course through Brgy. Curva, Nueva Ecija. Flat, well-marked, and perfect for all fitness levels. Race for fun, for community, for brotherhood.
Registration Fee
₱300.00
All Ages Race Bib Finisher Medal Race Shirt Cash Prizes
Program of Activities

Event Schedule

4:30 AM

Assembly & Registration Check-in

Participants gather at the starting area and collect race bibs and freebies.

5:00 AM

Opening Program & Prayer

Opening remarks, invocation, and national anthem.

5:30 AM

Warm-Up & Stretching

Group warm-up exercise led by fitness instructors.

6:00 AM

🔫 Gunstart — 5K Run

The race begins! All participants start at the starting line.

7:30 AM

Awarding & Closing Ceremony

Medal distribution, raffle draws, cash prize awarding, and group photo.

Location

Race Venue

📍

Brgy. Curva

Nueva Ecija

Open in Google Maps

Brgy. Curva

The 5K race is held in Barangay Curva, Nueva Ecija — a flat, scenic route that is perfect for all fitness levels and well-marked for safety.

📍

Brgy. Curva, Nueva Ecija
